subject: Use oparent-based parent
commit_message:
Use oparent-based parent

Replace odlparent-based version of parent poms with new oparent
based parent

Change-Id: I13d5938268ea4c7c8c3c4627cd689e38bc159815
Issue-ID: CCSDK-2182
Signed-off-by: Dan Timoney <dtimoney@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-core-maven-javadoc-verify-master-openjdk8/61/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-core-maven-javadoc-verify-master-openjdk8/61/ )
